title: OJ's RPG Origins
description: New weapons, new armor, new tools, new Origins ! All DnD themed !
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/PGrcTEz.png)




What this mod has to offer:
- Custom Weapons
- Custom Ores
- Custom World Generation for ores to spawn in all 3 dimensions
- RPG/DnD Origin classes to coExist with the Forge/Fabric Origins mod.
- This mod will support Origins.
- Better Combat Support for all weapons
- Project MMO Support for all items/blocks

Supported Mods!:

Better Combat ( recommended!! but optional )
Origins (FORGE) ( Recommended! Although optional this mod was made for an addon to the Origin playstyle )
Origins (Fabric) ( Reccommended! Although optional, this mod was made for an addon to the Origins playstyle )
Curios API ( required ) ( Not on Fabric Version)
Configured ( optional for config changes in game ) ( not on fabric version )
Project MMO Support ( coming soon/ optional ) ( not on fabric version)

Current Available Origins (Forge) in mod! ( optional dependency ): 
- Archer
- Bard
- Cleric
- Mage
- thief
- Brute
- Berserker

- Variant Human

New Ore!:

- Sapphire is the new gem you can find in the world and in dimensions!

- Comes in the form of an Ore, then Raw, which you smelt to sapphire.

- will be a main source of crafting for items

Armor!:

- FULL Sapphire Armor set ( 1 Tier above Netherite)

 

Tools:
- Full Sapphire tool set ( Sword/Hoe/Shovel/Pickaxe/Axe)

 

- Thieves Gloves - Sack that allows you to steal items from villagers - fully customizable with the config file. adds a thieves pocket curio slot for an extra inv. WORKS in curio slot! (FORGE)
- Thieves Gloves - Sack that allows you to steal items from villagers - NO config, No Curio, You have to smack a villager to steal!! ( FABRIC )


Current Weapons: 

Life Hunt - basic left attack, with special ability right click that will sweep a 3 mob limit attack. knocking them back, giving slowness, and life steal! 
Sapphire Staff - Right click for basic fire ball attack, or hold right click to launch a powerful fireball attack, will destroy blocks and send a blaze ( recommend to turn off /gamerule doMobGriefing false for no block break.
also /gamerule doFireTick false if you dont want fire! - may add new code to prevent this unsure yet)
Whelm Bow - Just a cool bow with a special ability to shoot 3 arrows at once! and of course infinity works!!
Harmonic Lute - passive effects and active effect, shift right click and right click for you and party buffing!
Sapphire Misery - Brutes main weapon, rage ability when right clicked giving resistance in battle!
More to come
Balmung - AOE Claymore that does huge damage

Custom Blocks:

- Sapphire Block
- Raw Sapphire Block

Questions and Answers:

- This mod is both Server and Client sided
- This mod can be freely added to your modpack. 
- NOW ON FABRIC 
- Please do not ask for newer versions, new to modding and learning slowly :)
- Of course more is to come!!!!
